\tzpentry{ID3377}{Omega Gyro VolumeIntegral Cross Cross Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3377 introduces Omega Gyro VolumeIntegral Cross Cross Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[Omega]gyro/c^2) VolumeIntegral[r \[Cross] (E \[Cross] B), {r, V}]; Hq = Sum[n Prob[nflux == n] \[HBar]/(2 e), {n, 0, Infinity}]; Hp = Integrate[\[HBar] \[Omega]k (nL[k] - nR[k]), {k, MomentumSpace}]; Hc + Hr + Hq + Hp ]; \end{implementation} \subsection{Linking Number Functional} \begin{definition}[Linking Number] For closed curves \(C_1\) and \(C_2\) in three–space, the Gauss linking integral defines their linking number as \[ \mathrm{Link}(C_1,C_2) = \frac{1}{4\pi} \iint_{C_1$\times$ C_2} \frac{(\mathrm{d}r_1 $\times$ \mathrm{d}r_2)\cdot (r_1 - r_2)}{|r_1 - r_2|^3}. \]
